original_image_tags: The back of a document page. The paper is aged and slightly discolored. At the top are two black hole-punch holes. Faint, illegible text from the reverse side shows through the paper. In the bottom right corner, there is a blue ink stamp. The stamp text is oriented upside down relative to the page orientation.

elements.description: Blue ink stamp near the bottom reading 'McCHORD FIELD FLT. SERV. CENTER JUL 25 1949', with the word 'TRANSMITTED' printed upside down below it.
Faint, illegible reversed text or ghosting visible at the top of the page.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the presence of a blue ink stamp and faint text, but Description B provides specific quoted text ('McCHORD FIELD FLT. SERV. CENTER JUL 25 1949', 'TRANSMITTED') while Description A does not read any text, which is an addition, not a contradiction.
